name: pharmacy-backend-production
description: Production-ready pharmacy management backend with PostgreSQL

scripts.init-db: node -e "const db = require('./database'); db.initializeDatabase().then(() => console.log('Database initialized')).catch(console.error)"
scripts.seed-db: node -e "const db = require('./database'); db.seedData().then(() => console.log('Data seeded')).catch(console.error)"

author: Pharmacy Management System
